items.title: Sail, whose software optimizes how AI models run on existing chips, emerges from stealth with $80M in seed and Series A led by Kleiner at a $450M valuation (Lily Mae Lazarus/Fortune)
items.title_original: Sail, whose software optimizes how AI models run on existing chips, emerges from stealth with $80M in seed and Series A led by Kleiner at a $450M valuation (Lily Mae Lazarus/Fortune)

items.title_zh: Sail 的软件优化了人工智能模型在现有芯片上的运行方式，在 Kleiner 领投的 A 轮融资和 8000 万美元的种子轮融资中脱颖而出，估值达到 4.5 亿美元（Lily Mae Lazarus/《财富》）

items.title: As China's working-age population shrinks, a consensus is emerging that it must deploy embodied AI robots into as many tasks as possible, as soon as possible (Financial Times)
items.title_original: As China's working-age population shrinks, a consensus is emerging that it must deploy embodied AI robots into as many tasks as possible, as soon as possible (Financial Times)
items.title_en: As China's working-age population shrinks, a consensus is emerging that it must deploy embodied AI robots into as many tasks as possible, as soon as possible (Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 随着中国劳动年龄人口的减少，人们正在形成一种共识，即必须尽快将人工智能机器人部署到尽可能多的任务中（金融时报）
items.title_bilingual: 随着中国劳动年龄人口的减少，人们正在形成一种共识，即必须尽快将人工智能机器人部署到尽可能多的任务中（金融时报） / As China's working-age population shrinks, a consensus is emerging that it must deploy embodied AI robots into as many tasks as possible, as soon as possible (Financial Times)

items.title: Paris-based Tsuga, whose observability software runs in customers' own clouds to help them skip per-byte ingestion costs, raised a $35M Series A led by Singular (Ana Maria Constantin/The Next Web)
items.title_original: Paris-based Tsuga, whose observability software runs in customers' own clouds to help them skip per-byte ingestion costs, raised a $35M Series A led by Singular (Ana Maria Constantin/The Next Web)
items.title_en: Paris-based Tsuga, whose observability software runs in customers' own clouds to help them skip per-byte ingestion costs, raised a $35M Series A led by Singular (Ana Maria Constantin/The Next Web)
items.title_zh: 总部位于巴黎的 Tsuga 的可观测性软件在客户自己的云中运行，以帮助他们跳过每字节的摄取成本，并筹集了由 Singular 领投的 3500 万美元 A 轮融资（Ana Maria Constantin/The Next Web）
items.title_bilingual: 总部位于巴黎的 Tsuga 的可观测性软件在客户自己的云中运行，以帮助他们跳过每字节的摄取成本，并筹集了由 Singular 领投的 3500 万美元 A 轮融资（Ana Maria Constantin/The Next Web） / Paris-based Tsuga, whose observability software runs in customers' own clouds to help them skip per-byte ingestion costs, raised a $35M Series A led by Singular (Ana Maria Constantin/The Next Web)

items.title: NAND flash maker Kioxia, Japan's most valuable company since June 12, plans to offer US depositary shares in spring 2027 amid AI-driven demand for memory chips (Bloomberg)
items.title_original: NAND flash maker Kioxia, Japan's most valuable company since June 12, plans to offer US depositary shares in spring 2027 amid AI-driven demand for memory chips (Bloomberg)
items.title_en: NAND flash maker Kioxia, Japan's most valuable company since June 12, plans to offer US depositary shares in spring 2027 amid AI-driven demand for memory chips (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: NAND 闪存制造商 Kioxia 是自 6 月 12 日以来日本市值最高的公司，由于人工智能驱动的存储芯片需求，该公司计划于 2027 年春季发行美国存托股票（彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: NAND 闪存制造商 Kioxia 是自 6 月 12 日以来日本市值最高的公司，由于人工智能驱动的存储芯片需求，该公司计划于 2027 年春季发行美国存托股票（彭博社） / NAND flash maker Kioxia, Japan's most valuable company since June 12, plans to offer US depositary shares in spring 2027 amid AI-driven demand for memory chips (Bloomberg)
